title: MNC Land sells IDR5.5 trillion assets for Bali Subway project
body: The project will connect the airport with Bali's major tourist destinations.

title: ESSA establishes consulting and chemical industry company
body: It is expected to support ESSA's operational activities.

title: Estika Tata Tiara's revenue skyrockets 589%
body: This surge was driven by a large contribution from the company's main segment, distribution & sales.

title: KEJU distributes bonus shares of IDR206.25 billion
body: Holders of 4 shares of the company will get 11 bonus shares.

title: JCI first session moved up 1.22%, AYLS sits in Top Gainers position
body: The Composite Stock Price Index (JCI) showed an increase of 1.22% or 85.13 points to 7,068.99 in the first trading session today.

title: MNC Land sells IDR5.5 trillion assets for Bali Subway project
body: The project will connect the airport with Bali's major tourist destinations.

title: ESSA establishes consulting and chemical industry company
body: It is expected to support ESSA's operational activities.

title: Estika Tata Tiara's revenue skyrockets 589%
body: This surge was driven by a large contribution from the company's main segment, distribution & sales.

title: KEJU distributes bonus shares of IDR206.25 billion
body: Holders of 4 shares of the company will get 11 bonus shares.

title: JCI first session moved up 1.22%, AYLS sits in Top Gainers position
body: The Composite Stock Price Index (JCI) showed an increase of 1.22% or 85.13 points to 7,068.99 in the first trading session today.

title: Foreign sell volume reaches 4 billion shares, net foreign volume drops to -474 million shares
body: On Friday, December 20, the net foreign list began with foreign sell volume totaling 4.10 billion shares. However, the foreign buy volume was only 3.63 billion shares.

title: Flour producer Raja Roti Cemerlang to debut in stock market, offering 291.5 million shares
body: PT Raja Roti Cemerlang Tbk (BRRC), a flour producer for bread production, will hold an Initial Public Offering (IPO).

title: For refinancing, SMMA issued bonds worth IDR 800 billion
body: PT Sinar Mas Multiartha Tbk (SMMA) will issue Shelf Registration Bonds III Phase II 2025 worth IDR 800 billion on January 10-14, 2025.

title: BJBR injects IDR 221.40 billion to BPD Jambi
body: PT BPD Jawa Barat dan Banten Tbk (BJBR) has injected IDR 221.40 billion in capital into BPD Jambi as part of the development of its Bank Business Group (Kelompok Usaha Bank/KUB).

title: HAIS to add 4 tug-and-barge sets to fleet in 2025
body: PT Hasnur Internasional Shipping Tbk (HAIS) is targeting a 5% increase in revenue and a 4% increase in net profit for 2025, fueled by the addition of new vessels to meet growing customer demand.

title: Hardi Wijaya invests 837 million shares in Provident Investasi (PALM)
body: On Wednesday, December 18, individual investor Hardi Wijaya Liong made the decision to purchase 837.58 million shares of PT Provident Investasi Bersama Tbk.

title: Indofood clarifies regarding 4 Indomie variants withdrawal in Australia
body: PT Indofood CBP Sukses Makmur Tbk (ICBP), the producer of Indomie, has clarified the decision by Australia to withdraw four Indomie products from the market in that country.

title: TBP to invest IDR 200 billion in 6 tugboat and barge sets
body: PT Trans Bahtera Pioneer (TBP) will invest IDR 200 billion to purchase six sets of tugboats and barges.

title: Modalku Group secures US$ 25 million from Cool Japan Fund
body: Modalku Group, a peer-to-peer (P2P) lending platform, has secured an investment of US$ 25 million from Cool Japan Fund (CJF), equivalent to IDR 398 billion with an exchange rate of IDR 15,599 per USD 1.

title: BMRI and BBCA weighed down JCI for the Last 3 Days
body: Shares of PT Bank Mandiri (Persero) Tbk (BMRI) and PT Bank Central Asia Tbk (BBCA) have consistently ranked as Top Laggards, contributing to the decline in the Jakarta Composite Index (JCI) for three consecutive days.

title: Unhan RI Collaborates with Wilo to Implement Modern Pump Technology
body: The Indonesian Defense University (Unhan RI) has partnered with Wilo, a German company specializing in modern pump technology, to implement advanced pump systems in various sectors, including defense.

title: JCI decline rally enters day 6, drops to 6,977.24
body: The Jakarta Composite Index (JCI) continued its six-day losing streak on Thursday (19/12), experiencing its steepest drop of 1.84%.

title: Efficiency and cost-of-funds reduction to be key strategies for BBYB in 2025
body: PT Bank Neo Commerce Tbk (BBYB) has outlined its strategic plan for 2025, highlighting digital innovation and cost efficiency to remain competitive in the banking industry.

title: Foreigners buy Gojek Tokopedia shares, net foreign volume closed at 315.52 million shares
body: Saham perusahaan digital PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO) puncaki daftar top buy pada Kamis (19/12) setelah para investor asing memborong 1,68 miliar lembar dan mencatatkan volume bersih 330,10 juta lembar.

title: Digital Director denies hacker attack on BRI
body: PT Bank Rakyat Indonesia Tbk (BBRI)’s Director of Digital and Information Technology, Arga M. Nugraha, assured the public that BRI's customer data and funds remain secure, following rumors of a data breach.

title: MDIY coming in to runner-up spot, GOTO tops net foreign
body: PT Goto Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO) displaced PT Astrindo Nusantara Infrastruktur Tbk (BIPI) from the top of net foreign transactions at today’s (19/12) closing bell.

title: HATM to carry out rights issue of 1.8 billion shares
body: PT Habco Trans Maritima Tbk (HATM) to carry out a rights issue of 1.8 billion shares with a nominal value of IDR 50 per share. The total shares to be issued are 25.71% of the 7 billion shares issued and paid up by this issuer.

title: Govt to collaborate with IPP to reach renewable energy mix target
body: The Indonesian government together with PT Perusahaan Listrik Negara (Persero) or PLN, are trying to achieve the new realization of New Renewable Energy (EBT) which is targeted at 17.87%.

title: Four blue-chip stocks decline, IHSG weakens
body: Jakarta Composite Index (JCI) dropped 0.74% due to the weakening of several large-cap stocks on Thursday afternoon (19/12).

title: Retail company MDIY reveals business prospects post-IPO
body: PT Daya Intiguna Yasa Tbk (MDIY), the issuer behind the MR. D.I.Y retail brand, is ready to seize the opportunities in the non-grocery retail segment, which remains substantial, after its listing on Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) today (19/12).

title: CGS International purchases 155 million shares of Astrindo Nusantara (BIPI)
body: On Tuesday, December 17, foreign investor CGS International Securities Singapore Pte Ltd bought 155 million shares to its holdings in PT Astrindo Nusantara Infrastruktur Tbk (BIPI).

title: Honour Accord to take over 80% of RONY
body: Honour Accord Limited (HAL) is set to acquire 80% of PT Aesler Grup International Tbk (RONY) from its two major shareholders, PT Nakula Investama Indonesia (NII) and PT Karimun Jawa Pratama (KJP).

title: INET projects 20% revenue growth in 2025
body: PT Sinergi Inti Andalan Prima Tbk (INET) is projecting revenue of IDR 42.02 billion for 2025, marking a 20% increase from the expected revenue of IDR 35.02 billion by the end of this year.

title: BI maintains rate at 6%, stock market expected to see more sell-offs
body: Bank Indonesia's (BI) decision to keep interest rates unchanged is expected to lead to a steady offloading trend in Indonesia’s stock market as the year comes to a close.

title: Optimizing laboratory services, MTMH now controls 80% of GGI
body: PT Murni Sadar Tbk (MTMH), the operator of Murni Teguh Hospitals, has acquired 80% of the shares of PT Global Genetika Indonesia (GGI) for IDR 3.56 billion to enhance its medical laboratory services.

title: Allocating 30% IPO proceeds for expansion, MDIY to boost performance
body: PT Daya Intiguna Yasa Tbk (MDIY) has officially made its debut on Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) on December 19, 2024.

title: Renewable energy company Hero Global Investment to set up IPO of 1.3 billion shares
body: PT Hero Global Investment Tbk (HGII), a renewable energy company, will conduct an Initial Public Offering (IPO) by releasing 1.3 billion shares.

title: Banks to receive liquidity support of IDR 290 trillion in 2025
body: Bank Indonesia (BI) will increase the portion of the Macroprudential Liquidity Incentive Policy (KLM) assistance to IDR 290 trillion for hundreds of banks starting next year.

title: ENRG to initiate buyback, setting up budget of USD 12 million
body: PT Energi Mega Persada Tbk (ENRG), an oil and gas company owned by the Bakrie Group, plans to conduct a share buyback with a budget of USD 12 million.

title: Positive revenue trend, yet MDKA saw worsening loss
body: Despite PT Merdeka Copper Gold Tbk (MDKA) achieving revenue growth of 42.5% year-on-year (yoy) up to September 2024, its losses have widened significantly.
